waiting_for: Price to stabilize above 30000/EMA75 zone and show bounce signals for long entry, or break below for deeper pullback to EMA150

long_assessment.reasoning: Price has reached the EMA75 pullback zone (30015.18) and pierced slightly to 30010.75, confluent with 30000 psych level (10.75 pts below). Trend remains bullish (EMA21>EMA75>EMA150). Bearish FVG above at 30044-30052.75 provides target confluence. However: 1) Price pierced EMA75 rather than cleanly testing, 2) Stochastic at 49.27 shows fading momentum but not oversold, 3) R/R with stop below EMA150 (29975) is only 0.81:1, below 1.3:1 minimum. Waiting for price to reclaim EMA75 or hold 30000 with stochastic turn higher before activating resting LIMIT order at EMA75. Setup age: 1 bar.

short_assessment.reasoning: Strong uptrend intact with aligned EMAs. Nearest bullish FVG below at 29950-29966 is 55 pts away - too distant for viable counter-trend short. No reversal signals, divergence, or EMA breakdown. Shorting into strong uptrend without clear reversal is low probability.
